option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Circle?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.TeacherDashboardController" styleClass="teacher-root" stylesheets="@../css/teacher-dashboard.css">
<left> <VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <VBox styleClass="teacher-brand-block"> <Label text="EduCore" styleClass="teacher-brand-title"/> <Label text="Teacher workspace" styleClass="teacher-brand-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar-nav" spacing="5"> <Button fx:id="btnNavDashboard" styleClass="teacher-nav-button teacher-nav-button-active" onAction="#onNavDashboard" text="Dashboard" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavCourses" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavCourses" text="Course Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavEvaluations" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavEvaluations" text="Evaluation Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavAbsence" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavAbsence" text="Absence Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStudents" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStudents" text="Students" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavFraud" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavFraud" text="Fraud Reports" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text="⚠"/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStatistics" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStatistics" text="Results & Statistics" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStatHackathon" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStatHackathon" text="Stat Hackathon" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavProfile" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavProfile" text="Profile" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> </VBox>
<Region styleClass="teacher-sidebar-spacer" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar-footer" spacing="0"> <Region styleClass="teacher-sidebar-footer-line"/> <Button fx:id="btnNavLogout" styleClass="teacher-nav-button teacher-nav-logout" onAction="#onLogout" text="Logout" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> </VBox> </VBox> </left>
<center> <BorderPane styleClass="teacher-main-region"> <top> <HBox styleClass="teacher-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"> <VBox spacing="4" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="lblWelcome" styleClass="teacher-welcome-title" text="Welcome, Professor"/> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeSub" styleClass="teacher-welcome-sub" text="Manage courses, evaluations, attendance, and integrity monitoring."/> </VBox> <Label fx:id="lblDateTime" styleClass="teacher-header-datetime" text="—"/> <HBox spacing="6" alignment="CENTER"> <Button fx:id="btnNotifications" styleClass="teacher-icon-button" onAction="#onNotifications" text="" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Label text="2" style="-fx-background-color: #f97316; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 10px; -fx-padding: 2 6; -fx-background-radius: 8;"/> </HBox> <StackPane> <Circle radius="22" styleClass="teacher-avatar-circle"/> <Label fx:id="lblAvatarInitials" styleClass="teacher-avatar-initials" text="?"/> </StackPane> </HBox> </top>
<center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="teacher-content-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER"> <StackPane minHeight="420" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0"> <VBox fx:id="paneDashboard" spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-content-body"> <HBox styleClass="teacher-dashboard-header-embed" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeDash" styleClass="teacher-welcome-title" text="Welcome, Professor"/> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeSubDash" styleClass="teacher-welcome-sub" text="Manage courses, evaluations, attendance, and integrity monitoring."/> </VBox> <Label fx:id="lblDateTimeDash" styleClass="teacher-header-datetime" text="—"/> <StackPane styleClass="teacher-notify-stack"> <Button fx:id="btnNotificationsDash" styleClass="teacher-icon-button" onAction="#onNotifications" text="" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Label text="2" styleClass="teacher-notify-badge" mouseTransparent="true" StackPane.alignment="TOP_RIGHT"/> </StackPane> <StackPane> <Circle radius="22" styleClass="teacher-avatar-circle"/> <Label fx:id="lblAvatarDash" styleClass="teacher-avatar-initials" text="?"/> </StackPane> </HBox> <Label text="Overview" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Key metrics for your classes, assessments, and academic integrity." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> <FlowPane styleClass="teacher-cards-flow" hgap="18" vgap="18"> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardCourses"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-courses"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total courses" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatCourses" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Published & draft modules" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardEvaluations"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-eval"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total evaluations" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatEvaluations" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Quizzes, exams & assignments" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardStudents"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-students"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total students" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatStudents" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Across your taught classes" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardFraud"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-fraud"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text="⚠"/> <Label text="Fraud alerts" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatFraud" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Anti-cheat flags to review" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> </FlowPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneCourseMgmt" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Course management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Create and organize modules, chapters, and learning resources." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <BorderPane fx:id="courseMgmtShell" minHeight="520" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneEvalMgmt" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Evaluation management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Build question banks, schedule assessments, and review submissions." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <BorderPane fx:id="evalMgmtShell" minHeight="520" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneAbsence" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Absence management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Take attendance for the selected class." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-panel-card" spacing="16" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <HBox styleClass="teacher-toolbar" spacing="14" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Class:" styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> <ComboBox fx:id="comboClasse" prefWidth="220" promptText="Select class..."/> <Button text="Load students" onAction="#chargerEtudiants" styleClass="teacher-primary-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> </HBox> <TableView fx:id="tableEtudiants" styleClass="teacher-table" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" minHeight="280"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colMatricule" prefWidth="120" text="Student ID"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colNom" prefWidth="160" text="Last name"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colPrenom" prefWidth="160" text="First name"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatut" prefWidth="130" text="Status"/> </columns> </TableView> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="16"> <Button text="Present" onAction="#marquerPresent" styleClass="teacher-success-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Button text="Absent" onAction="#marquerAbsent" styleClass="teacher-danger-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> </HBox> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneStudents" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Students" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Monitor enrolment, progress, and participation." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Student monitoring" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Add rosters, risk flags, and activity timelines here." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneFraud" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Fraud reports" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Review incidents from the anti-cheat / proctoring pipeline." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Integrity inbox" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Integrate FraudeService / FraudeLog DAO to list suspicious attempts and detections." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneStatistics" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Results & statistics" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Aggregate performance and item analysis." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Analytics" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Charts for grade distributions and pass rates can bind to your Resultat services." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneProfile" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <Label text="Profile" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <VBox spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-panel-card" alignment="TOP_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity"> <HBox spacing="32" styleClass="teacher-profile-grid"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="First name" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfilePrenom" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Last name" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfileNom" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> </HBox> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Email" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfileEmail" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> </VBox> </VBox> </StackPane> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Circle?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.TeacherDashboardController" styleClass="teacher-root" stylesheets="@../css/teacher-dashboard.css">
<left> <VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <VBox styleClass="teacher-brand-block"> <Label text="EduCore" styleClass="teacher-brand-title"/> <Label text="Teacher workspace" styleClass="teacher-brand-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar-nav" spacing="5"> <Button fx:id="btnNavDashboard" styleClass="teacher-nav-button teacher-nav-button-active" onAction="#onNavDashboard" text="Dashboard" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavCourses" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavCourses" text="Course Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavEvaluations" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavEvaluations" text="Evaluation Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavReservationMateriel" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavReservationMateriel" text="Réservation matériel" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavAbsence" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavAbsence" text="Absence Management" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStudents" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStudents" text="Students" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavFraud" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavFraud" text="Fraud Reports" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text="⚠"/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStatistics" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStatistics" text="Results & Statistics" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavStatHackathon" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavStatHackathon" text="Stat Hackathon" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> <Button fx:id="btnNavProfile" styleClass="teacher-nav-button" onAction="#onNavProfile" text="Profile" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> </VBox>
<Region styleClass="teacher-sidebar-spacer" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<VBox styleClass="teacher-sidebar-footer" spacing="0"> <Region styleClass="teacher-sidebar-footer-line"/> <Button fx:id="btnNavLogout" styleClass="teacher-nav-button teacher-nav-logout" onAction="#onLogout" text="Logout" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false"> <graphic><Label styleClass="teacher-nav-icon" text=""/></graphic> </Button> </VBox> </VBox> </left>
<center> <BorderPane styleClass="teacher-main-region"> <top> <HBox styleClass="teacher-header" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"> <VBox spacing="4" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="lblWelcome" styleClass="teacher-welcome-title" text="Welcome, Professor"/> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeSub" styleClass="teacher-welcome-sub" text="Manage courses, evaluations, attendance, and integrity monitoring."/> </VBox> <Label fx:id="lblDateTime" styleClass="teacher-header-datetime" text="—"/> <HBox spacing="6" alignment="CENTER"> <Button fx:id="btnNotifications" styleClass="teacher-icon-button" onAction="#onNotifications" text="" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Label text="2" style="-fx-background-color: #f97316; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 10px; -fx-padding: 2 6; -fx-background-radius: 8;"/> </HBox> <StackPane> <Circle radius="22" styleClass="teacher-avatar-circle"/> <Label fx:id="lblAvatarInitials" styleClass="teacher-avatar-initials" text="?"/> </StackPane> </HBox> </top>
<center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="teacher-content-scroll" hbarPolicy="NEVER"> <StackPane minHeight="420" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0"> <VBox fx:id="paneDashboard" spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-content-body"> <HBox styleClass="teacher-dashboard-header-embed" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeDash" styleClass="teacher-welcome-title" text="Welcome, Professor"/> <Label fx:id="lblWelcomeSubDash" styleClass="teacher-welcome-sub" text="Manage courses, evaluations, attendance, and integrity monitoring."/> </VBox> <Label fx:id="lblDateTimeDash" styleClass="teacher-header-datetime" text="—"/> <StackPane styleClass="teacher-notify-stack"> <Button fx:id="btnNotificationsDash" styleClass="teacher-icon-button" onAction="#onNotifications" text="" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Label text="2" styleClass="teacher-notify-badge" mouseTransparent="true" StackPane.alignment="TOP_RIGHT"/> </StackPane> <StackPane> <Circle radius="22" styleClass="teacher-avatar-circle"/> <Label fx:id="lblAvatarDash" styleClass="teacher-avatar-initials" text="?"/> </StackPane> </HBox> <Label text="Overview" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Key metrics for your classes, assessments, and academic integrity." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> <FlowPane styleClass="teacher-cards-flow" hgap="18" vgap="18"> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardCourses"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-courses"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total courses" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatCourses" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Published & draft modules" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardEvaluations"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-eval"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total evaluations" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatEvaluations" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Quizzes, exams & assignments" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardStudents"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-students"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text=""/> <Label text="Total students" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatStudents" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Across your taught classes" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-stat-card" spacing="10" onMouseClicked="#onCardFraud"> <Region styleClass="teacher-stat-accent, accent-teach-fraud"/> <Label styleClass="teacher-stat-icon" text="⚠"/> <Label text="Fraud alerts" styleClass="teacher-stat-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblStatFraud" styleClass="teacher-stat-value" text="0"/> <Label text="Anti-cheat flags to review" styleClass="teacher-stat-foot"/> </VBox> </FlowPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneCourseMgmt" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Course management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Create and organize modules, chapters, and learning resources." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <BorderPane fx:id="courseMgmtShell" minHeight="520" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneEvalMgmt" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Evaluation management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Build question banks, schedule assessments, and review submissions." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <BorderPane fx:id="evalMgmtShell" minHeight="520" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" minWidth="0.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneReservationMateriel" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Réservation matériel" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Manage equipment reservations and availability." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox fx:id="reservationMaterielShell" spacing="0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneAbsence" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Absence management" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Take attendance for the selected class." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-panel-card" spacing="16" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <HBox styleClass="teacher-toolbar" spacing="14" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Class:" styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> <ComboBox fx:id="comboClasse" prefWidth="220" promptText="Select class..."/> <Button text="Load students" onAction="#chargerEtudiants" styleClass="teacher-primary-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> </HBox> <TableView fx:id="tableEtudiants" styleClass="teacher-table" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" minHeight="280"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colMatricule" prefWidth="120" text="Student ID"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colNom" prefWidth="160" text="Last name"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colPrenom" prefWidth="160" text="First name"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatut" prefWidth="130" text="Status"/> </columns> </TableView> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="16"> <Button text="Present" onAction="#marquerPresent" styleClass="teacher-success-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> <Button text="Absent" onAction="#marquerAbsent" styleClass="teacher-danger-btn" mnemonicParsing="false"/> </HBox> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneStudents" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Students" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Monitor enrolment, progress, and participation." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Student monitoring" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Add rosters, risk flags, and activity timelines here." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneFraud" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Fraud reports" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Review incidents from the anti-cheat / proctoring pipeline." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Integrity inbox" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Integrate FraudeService / FraudeLog DAO to list suspicious attempts and detections." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneStatistics" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="14" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Results & statistics" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <Label text="Aggregate performance and item analysis." styleClass="teacher-section-hint"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="teacher-placeholder" maxWidth="Infinity" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="Analytics" styleClass="teacher-placeholder-title"/> <Label text="Charts for grade distributions and pass rates can bind to your Resultat services." styleClass="teacher-placeholder-text"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="paneProfile" visible="false" managed="false" spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-content-body" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"> <Label text="Profile" styleClass="teacher-section-title"/> <VBox spacing="16" styleClass="teacher-panel-card" alignment="TOP_LEFT" maxWidth="Infinity"> <HBox spacing="32" styleClass="teacher-profile-grid"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="First name" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfilePrenom" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Last name" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfileNom" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> </HBox> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Email" styleClass="teacher-profile-label"/> <Label fx:id="lblProfileEmail" styleClass="teacher-profile-value" text="—"/> </VBox> </VBox> </VBox> </StackPane> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane> </center> </BorderPane>
